## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Zuplo and GrowthX teams to discuss content strategy, performance, and ongoing projects.](https://fathom.video/share/B_pAzPhZJfMVmd84WyKEoETs1dxbPsKx?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Indexing issues persist for Zuplo's blog content, requiring manual requests and investigation](https://fathom.video/share/B_pAzPhZJfMVmd84WyKEoETs1dxbPsKx?tab=summary&timestamp=769.0)
  - [New quote strategy for articles: focus on LinkedIn/thought leader quotes, analyst reports, with manual verification](https://fathom.video/share/B_pAzPhZJfMVmd84WyKEoETs1dxbPsKx?tab=summary&timestamp=1200.0)
  - [Content refresh project categorized by priority; awaiting final review before implementation](https://fathom.video/share/B_pAzPhZJfMVmd84WyKEoETs1dxbPsKx?tab=summary&timestamp=1475.0)
  - [Backlink efforts need renewed focus and regular updates with new GrowthX point of contact](https://fathom.video/share/B_pAzPhZJfMVmd84WyKEoETs1dxbPsKx?tab=summary&timestamp=1584.0)

## Topics

### Team Updates

  - [Carrie Chowske introduced as new GrowthX team member, shadowing processes](https://fathom.video/share/B_pAzPhZJfMVmd84WyKEoETs1dxbPsKx?tab=summary&timestamp=275.0)
  - [Potential meeting time adjustment to accommodate Dave's schedule; Adrian has some flexibility](https://fathom.video/share/B_pAzPhZJfMVmd84WyKEoETs1dxbPsKx?tab=summary&timestamp=364.0)

### Content Production

  - [14 pieces uploaded for the week, ahead of schedule](https://fathom.video/share/B_pAzPhZJfMVmd84WyKEoETs1dxbPsKx?tab=summary&timestamp=494.0)
  - [Dave to send next week's topic suggestions for review](https://fathom.video/share/B_pAzPhZJfMVmd84WyKEoETs1dxbPsKx?tab=summary&timestamp=514.0)
  - [New process for categorizing commercial/informational content in Airtable](https://fathom.video/share/B_pAzPhZJfMVmd84WyKEoETs1dxbPsKx?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)

### Performance and Indexing Issues

  - [Significant drop in clicks and impressions week-over-week](https://fathom.video/share/B_pAzPhZJfMVmd84WyKEoETs1dxbPsKx?tab=summary&timestamp=575.0)
  - [Persistent indexing problems: many articles not indexing naturally, requiring manual requests](https://fathom.video/share/B_pAzPhZJfMVmd84WyKEoETs1dxbPsKx?tab=summary&timestamp=592.0)
  - [No clear warnings or issues found in Google Search Console](https://fathom.video/share/B_pAzPhZJfMVmd84WyKEoETs1dxbPsKx?tab=summary&timestamp=598.0)
  - [Team to investigate potential causes: site map structure, content syndication, tag pages](https://fathom.video/share/B_pAzPhZJfMVmd84WyKEoETs1dxbPsKx?tab=summary&timestamp=603.0)

### Quote Strategy for Articles

  - [Preference for LinkedIn quotes or authoritative sources (e.g., Gartner)](https://fathom.video/share/B_pAzPhZJfMVmd84WyKEoETs1dxbPsKx?tab=summary&timestamp=1299.0)
  - [Focus on authenticity and storytelling in quotes (3 lines max)](https://fathom.video/share/B_pAzPhZJfMVmd84WyKEoETs1dxbPsKx?tab=summary&timestamp=1249.0)
  - [Target profiles: tech leadership (CTO, Director of Engineering) or senior/staff engineers](https://fathom.video/share/B_pAzPhZJfMVmd84WyKEoETs1dxbPsKx?tab=summary&timestamp=1307.0)
  - [Manual verification needed to prevent AI hallucination of quotes](https://fathom.video/share/B_pAzPhZJfMVmd84WyKEoETs1dxbPsKx?tab=summary&timestamp=1340.0)

### Content Refresh Project

  - [Categorized by priority (high to low)](https://fathom.video/share/B_pAzPhZJfMVmd84WyKEoETs1dxbPsKx?tab=summary&timestamp=1475.0)
  - [Awaiting Dave's review before sending to Adrian](https://fathom.video/share/B_pAzPhZJfMVmd84WyKEoETs1dxbPsKx?tab=summary&timestamp=1488.0)
  - [Will incorporate AI-assisted improvement as part of the refresh process](https://fathom.video/share/B_pAzPhZJfMVmd84WyKEoETs1dxbPsKx?tab=summary&timestamp=1459.0)

### Backlink Strategy

  - [New point of contact (Jason) at GrowthX for backlink efforts](https://fathom.video/share/B_pAzPhZJfMVmd84WyKEoETs1dxbPsKx?tab=summary&timestamp=1560.0)
  - [Need for regular updates and transparency on backlink progress](https://fathom.video/share/B_pAzPhZJfMVmd84WyKEoETs1dxbPsKx?tab=summary&timestamp=1613.0)
  - [Emphasis on improving domain authority to maximize content efforts](https://fathom.video/share/B_pAzPhZJfMVmd84WyKEoETs1dxbPsKx?tab=summary&timestamp=1589.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Adrian to review transactional/commercial keywords for content planning](https://fathom.video/share/B_pAzPhZJfMVmd84WyKEoETs1dxbPsKx?tab=summary&timestamp=1653.0)
  - [Jenn to follow up on backlink strategy updates and new point of contact](https://fathom.video/share/B_pAzPhZJfMVmd84WyKEoETs1dxbPsKx?tab=summary&timestamp=1633.0)
  - [Team to continue investigating indexing issues and potential solutions](https://fathom.video/share/B_pAzPhZJfMVmd84WyKEoETs1dxbPsKx?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
  - [Implement new quote strategy in upcoming content, with manual verification](https://fathom.video/share/B_pAzPhZJfMVmd84WyKEoETs1dxbPsKx?tab=summary&timestamp=1400.0)
  - [Finalize and begin implementing content refresh project after review](https://fathom.video/share/B_pAzPhZJfMVmd84WyKEoETs1dxbPsKx?tab=summary&timestamp=1475.0)
